speaker: MATT
raw_text: The person comes to consciousness immediately as the axe is pulled. (gasping) You get a better look at him now. You can see scruffed, probably unshaven for the past two weeks, coming out in tufts. It looks like there are parts where the hair isn't growing in because there's scarring or some sort of heavy acne at a younger age prevented those follicles from developing. Pockmarked face, weathered from sun and perpetual sunburns. You can see the actual hair itself is a matted, greasy mess of a light brown color. Looks like the kind of person you'd imagine lives at sea and not in a very monetarily comfortable income.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: He got an axe in his head.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's probably good you didn't pull it out.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, see!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I'm going to tap him on the head and cast Healing Word at 3rd-level.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's 11 points right there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: As soon as Cad's hands start to glow, I yank the axe out of his head.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, you yank it out and there's a streak of blood and you watch as what would be the open axe wound begins to slowly seal itself up to the point where it's still going to be healing for a while, but it scabbed over instantaneously.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Look, you just saved a life! That's good news, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Well, he'll be dead eventually. I'm going to head back upstairs.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Fuck me! Oh god! Help!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Caduceus heads back upstairs.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Caduceus is America tonight.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Too real.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "We were sent by Avantika to head back to Nicodranas, and we're supposed to wait for about a week or two. Interface with that guy Marius. Either he was going to pay us back for the money, if he didn't get what he was supposed to find, and if he did have what he was supposed to deliver-- one of the things I burned was a drawing of it, it was an orb thing. We were supposed to take that back to Avantika."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Primarily it was maps to locations of things that were important. For our travels."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Like?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Like things that-- I wasn't the navigator! I didn't know specifically, but I was told to burn everything."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Is there some stuff you didn't get to?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You rummaged through and found a few things. Most of it's scrap and ash, or blank sheets that look like they were scribbled notes in a code that you don't really understand. This is the only visible thing.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh yes, Matthew! Do us right! Ooh!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Take care of him. I pull out the book and I begin to do the ritual for Comprehend Languages to see if that will help with the code. It's a long shot, but I'll give it a shot.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What was the message you were trying to get?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Is it ten minute casting time?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: But we still have the ink of that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You still have the ink of that, yeah. It's a large piece of paper that is mostly blank, and then there's that one section that is stained with the burned edges and has the actual drawing.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh wow, so it spread out blank from-- that's cool.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: So it's an island.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: The code was where? You said there was a code, I thought?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There was some things with bits of coded language on it, it looked like. But those have also been burned, and they're in chunks. You do your--?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, it takes ten-ish minutes to do Comprehend Languages, and if I'm touching--

speaker: MATT
raw_text: One action plus ten minutes, okay. There you go. Then it would be a total of 11 minutes. All righty. While you're working on that, you guys can continue to pry, if you want.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: But we still have the ink of that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You still have the ink of that, yeah. It's a large piece of paper that is mostly blank, and then there's that one section that is stained with the burned edges and has the actual drawing.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh wow, so it spread out blank from-- that's cool.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: So it's an island.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: The code was where? You said there was a code, I thought?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There was some things with bits of coded language on it, it looked like. But those have also been burned, and they're in chunks. You do your--?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, it takes ten-ish minutes to do Comprehend Languages, and if I'm touching--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Is it ten minute casting time?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It is ten minutes plus one minute as a ritual. So yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As a ritual, it's whatever the duration is--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Casting time  one action, plus ten minutes.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "It's generally the hub of most unlawful activity out here. Used to belong to the Concord, but about 50 years back, it was taken by people of my professional interests and they haven't been able to take it back since."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: If we drop you off, are you going to change your name or something? Are you afraid Avantika is going to come and kill you?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I mean, probably lay low for a while. There's other jobs out there. Find my way back to Darktow eventually."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Tell us about-- oh, sorry.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, you go. You go next.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, all right. Tell us about Avantika.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "She's a weird one. Her whole crew, they've got some weird mystical thing they're obsessed with."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Like the ball? Is it the ball?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "That's one of the things we're supposed to be picking up, yeah. They've got some creepy religious thing. We work for her. She hired us as the sister ship out of Darktow and we've been doing errands for her."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Docktow?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Darktow, yeah."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What's that?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Well we'd just stocked up so we've got probably about two weeks of tack and water and some ale below."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I didn't get all the details. I wasn't one of the important ones."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You should be important!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You survived this brutal attack. You are extremely strong.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He's sitting there going, "Yeah. Yeah you're right."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Everyone else died. You had an axe in your head!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Fuck them! Fuck them! I'm a survivor."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You had an axe in your head! You survived!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I had a what?" He reaches back and is like-- There's like still blood back there, of course, and he's like, "I'm okay? Is it bad?"

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's nothing to you. It's nothing! Missed all the major organs. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You're fine.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What else do we need to know? Anything? How about this ship, you know this ship? Is there anything funky on the ship? How much food stores do we have? How many days of food and water?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: I'll say sure. Technically ten minutes is a while, but we'll say between the small talk, you've completed your spell.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Well we'd just stocked up so we've got probably about two weeks of tack and water and some ale below."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Do you know how to sail?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I know how to repair. I was more of the ship carpenter."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You know what we should do first? Since we have a carpenter on board?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: On the side of the ship it says "The Mist."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We should change the name.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We should get some new letters going.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Like Mysterious Ball. The Mysterious Ball.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes, The Mistress of the Loins. I don't know, what would be a good name?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: The Mistake.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That's not bad.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Kind of appropriate?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: The Mistake!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's really on brand!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We took The Mist, and now it's The Mistake.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Did my spell trigger yet?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: There's at least five jokes in there.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "I'm going to go lay down for a minute."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Temporarily.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: --for the purposes of this sea voyage, at the end of which, you will be compensated for your duties. If you kill any of us, you will be thrown overboard.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: If you jump overboard, we'll jump after you, and we'll bring you back.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Also, as a result of us not mostly knowing how to sail, you are also the first mate.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Okay."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Congratulations.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That's a big promotion for him. Carpenter to first mate!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: He's kind of the worst.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Congratulations!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Okay."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Welcome to The Mighty Nein.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You just got a come-up.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Thank you. Should I go get my stuff, then?"

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You're the first mate! Why don't you give us an order?!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Ah!" He points towards you and, "Um." He's not a very intelligent fellow. "Go... fetch me some... dried meat."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I don't feel doing that. Maybe you should just go upstairs.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Yeah, it's maybe 2 30, 3 00 in the morning, at this point.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Ah!" He points towards you and, "Um." He's not a very intelligent fellow. "Go... fetch me some... dried meat."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I don't feel doing that. Maybe you should just go upstairs.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I'm going to go lay down for a minute."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Hmm, okay. I'm just going to tie your hands while you're sleeping, though, okay?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Okay."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You head down to the cabin quarters to one of the small cots that are there, essentially, and tie him down. He's like, "Mmm." He passes out; he's exhausted.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Poor guy!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You got a new pet.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Let's call him--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Professor Thaddeus!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: The second!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What was his actual name?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Gallan.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: G-A-L-L-A-N.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Thaddeus Klossowski von Musel.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: The second.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. While that's happening, the rest of you on the surface, where are you taking it?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Time of day-ish?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Time of night-ish.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, shit.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "It has been the truth! Why am I lying to you right now, you've destroyed my shirt, you've made me lose a tooth--"

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: No, I've met this type. He plays stupid, that way if people start asking questions you've got disbelief.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Exactly! So if I don't know technically who I'm involved with and what the larger scale of my work is, if anybody starts asking questions, I'm as dumb as the rest of them. It's got me this far."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Still doesn't mean you're not a criminal though.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "That's for the people to decide."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Listen, what we're going to ask for is that you be as forthcoming as you possibly can be. Would you mind walking over to the side of the ship there, and tell me how far Nicodranas looks right now?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He goes over and looks. "Can't see it."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Can't see it, can you? Stuck with us. So I'm going to need everything that comes out of your mouth to be the truth.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: It's maybe, depending on the job, two, three gold a day.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We would be exhausted.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We could turn around and try to go to the-- Where was the wharfmaster? The dwarf. Ingus?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I think it was Ignus.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Ignus.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Are we seriously considering bringing the ship right back to Nicodranas?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's a different section of the city.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Do we have a lifeboat or any sort of buoy or anything?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yes, lifeboat. Is there a--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There's not a lifeboat, per se. There is a small row skiff.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: What about pulling into a cove outside of the city a couple of miles and walking in?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Or we could just leave the boat out in the ocean a little bit and take the skiff in.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Are we hiring a crew? Are we kidnapping a crew?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Hiring a crew.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Do we have enough money?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Fuck. I don't know.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You've not hired a crew before. You just know what you've worked for which is not a lot.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: How much did you make when you were--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Not a ton.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. You guys finish your time at watch. The rest of you come to consciousness. It's now late morning, going to be approaching the afternoon fairly soon, but you've woken up, some food has been devoured, your cabin mate, Gallan, has come to consciousness, and has instinctually gone to start looking at the side of the boat and starting to repair bits of the Fireball damage you had left. Pulls out his tools, starts going to work on that.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Is that a sign that maybe we should really leave?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I think we'll expand our travel pattern to skate out wider.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Sometimes it's worth owning a mistake, and I think yesterday was a big mistake.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We don't necessarily want to own that here; they are very stern about mistakes.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Well, by owning it, I mean stop trying to necessarily fix it, and let it be a mistake.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I agree with that.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: And maybe just--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Move on?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Admit that there might be no fixing this.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I think that's wise.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The ship does have a wide berth. It's only one ship that's going across the entire coast there, but that's one thing you've noticed. It's a danger.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Going to have some thoughts about that flag, too, but that's for tomorrow.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: The wood is being repaired, but it's a few days of repair to get all that taken care of.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're not sure what the content would require, but you've seen a few formal documents in passing, and you make it up as you go and you hope it's enough. You're proud of it, but you hope it's enough.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: This is really pretty.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Don't forget to spray it with perfume.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, right. A little lavender oil right in the corner.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Are you taking it in to dock, or are you waiting outside and taking the skiff in?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We should take it to the dock.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's up to you.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That way we have you.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Let's take it into dock. Against all the advice of zhelezo looking for a burned ship that had a Fireball.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It doesn't look burned anymore, does it?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Jester has fixed the sail.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The sail's been fixed.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Blackened, charred wood on the outside of it in a sphere shape.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I thought we fixed-- did we fix that? Did we fix the black sphere?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Perfect. Okay. It takes you a few hours, but you gather the materials that are needed. The total

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We're going to need food and supplies, so anything that you think that we might need, I'll go pick that up.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'll tell them the amount of supplies that I think they need to pick up for a month's worth of travel.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. That'd be a lot of additional rope, some repair materials for the ship, maybe an additional set of tools, a couple of empty barrels, just in case you need them. Actually quite a few barrels if you're going to be buying a lot more food, because right now, since they had stocked up with what they had felt they needed just for their crew and the short trip they were making their way there, if you're stocking up for a while, you're going to need more means of transport and storage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, I've disguised myself to look like an old, grizzled sailor.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: cost for all of the materials together, for all of you-- is it food for a month as well?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'll tell them the amount of supplies that I think they need to pick up for a month's worth of travel.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. That'd be a lot of additional rope, some repair materials for the ship, maybe an additional set of tools, a couple of empty barrels, just in case you need them. Actually quite a few barrels if you're going to be buying a lot more food, because right now, since they had stocked up with what they had felt they needed just for their crew and the short trip they were making their way there, if you're stocking up for a while, you're going to need more means of transport and storage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, I've disguised myself to look like an old, grizzled sailor.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Perfect. Okay. It takes you a few hours, but you gather the materials that are needed. The total

speaker: MATT
raw_text: For a month, that's going to be about, I'd say 300 gold.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, I've disguised myself to look like an old, grizzled sailor.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Perfect. Okay. It takes you a few hours, but you gather the materials that are needed. The total

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: cost for all of the materials together, for all of you-- is it food for a month as well?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'll even go so far as to say good food for a month. I'm going to bake some shit. Fuck it. I also know that I can create food if I have to, so I can do a lot of, like, base--

speaker: MATT
raw_text: If it's good food, for all of you guys and the people that you're hiring on the crew, to feed all of you, every day, for a month?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, I've disguised myself to look like an old, grizzled sailor.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Perfect. Okay. It takes you a few hours, but you gather the materials that are needed. The total

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: cost for all of the materials together, for all of you-- is it food for a month as well?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'll even go so far as to say good food for a month. I'm going to bake some shit. Fuck it. I also know that I can create food if I have to, so I can do a lot of, like, base--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: For a month, that's going to be about, I'd say 300 gold.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I do not have 300 gold.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. It's still better food than most sailors have on long trips for that cost. That's for you and the entire crew you're hiring and the two you have on your ship, for a month. Okay, so you acquire that bit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Perfect. Okay. It takes you a few hours, but you gather the materials that are needed. The total

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: cost for all of the materials together, for all of you-- is it food for a month as well?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'll even go so far as to say good food for a month. I'm going to bake some shit. Fuck it. I also know that I can create food if I have to, so I can do a lot of, like, base--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: For a month, that's going to be about, I'd say 300 gold.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I do not have 300 gold.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: If it's good food, for all of you guys and the people that you're hiring on the crew, to feed all of you, every day, for a month?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: How about mac 'n' cheese?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: What's adequate food?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Adequate food will put you at about 100 gold.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Well, let's do that. I'll do 50 gold and you do 50 gold.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'll do 50 gold, plus I'll up my spice to make do.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Little time passes, and sauntering up onto the dock, you see the massive, waddling form of the tortle, with the sack over the shoulder. The rest of the deckhands look and give a nod. Some recognize him, others are still like, "Fucking tortles, they're weird." Then eventually makes his way to the ship, over to the skiff and goes-- Oh no, you guys have the ship in dock. You brought it all in there. He walks over and steps up onto the gangplank. "So whom-- who am I talking to?"

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Why do we know that he likes or hangs out with?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Marius.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, we can say "Marius needs help. Come to Open Quay--"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: No? Shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Just say, your messages, you put it  Your friends from the other night. That's it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Dear Orly--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's the first two. Go.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: (singing) How are you? I'm fine. Everybody else is too.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Come to Open Quay. The Mistake will hire you as a navigator. Lots o'money. That's one word.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (uncertain groan)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: O'money. Of money. Okay. Lots of money. No, no.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, I know.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Now?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: How many words do I have left?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Is that 17 that she's--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, eight left.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Eight left?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Come now. Also, The Mistake is a boat.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Come now. Also, The Mistake is a boat.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yep. There's a brief pause, and eventually, you hear this voice come through, "I'll swing on over. Soon as I m-m-muster the energy to finish my breakfast."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: He's coming.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. All right. The evening comes quick; by the time you guys are leaving, it's not that far from dusk, and so your first evening out on your new trajectory, you have time. What do you want to send to Marion?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Well, that's fair. I hadn't really thought about that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "It's kind of new to myself as well."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We're heading towards an island. I've heard stories. Let's go to the island.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you guys are--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: When we fully get out of the reach of the land, by the way, as we're sailing away, I just want to keep an eye out on the horizon and be like: Professor! See if I see him.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a perception check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I throw some dead pigeon or seagull in the air.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Never has there been a more worthless perception check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Nope. Seven.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No sign of the Professor. You do have-- what is it, Sprinkle? Sprinkle is still nestled up next to you. However your blink puppy, Nugget, still remains with Marion back in Nicodranas.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I want to send a message to her before we go to sleep tonight.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: To Nugget or your mom?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: To my mama.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: She doesn't have the chance to respond to the first one, because you go right through to the second, but Marion does respond to the second and goes, "Oh! Well, thank you for letting me know, Jester. Be safe, be bright, and make me proud. And come back soon. You and your friends. Goodbye!" All right, who's keeping watch the first evening? Because now, with a full crew, you can go full pace on this longship, which will put you about 72 miles per day. It's about a 250 nautical mile trip, including through the reef, with a full crew. That means it'll put you there in a little over three days, about three and a half, maybe four days with careful passage through the reef. For the evening, who's watch? Okay. And you have crew who can take up as well, if you want to. So one of you or both of you, make a perception check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I want to send a message to her before we go to sleep tonight.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: To Nugget or your mom?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: To my mama.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. All right. The evening comes quick; by the time you guys are leaving, it's not that far from dusk, and so your first evening out on your new trajectory, you have time. What do you want to send to Marion?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Mama, stuff happened at the docks and we had to leave very quickly. Please take care of Nugget for a while. We'll be back, I promise. You may have heard about the little girl who was killing herself on the dock--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Are you using this across multiple spells?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes, this is my second message. My second message: that looked like me but it wasn't me, don't worry, I'm very much alive, and I love you very much, and I'll be home soon.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Beep!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: 15? Okay. During the evening, you keep an eye on the waves. At some point, the moon itself is starting to find itself low in the sky, and you look over and you see this faint glow in the water below. You feel the back of your neck get warm for a second and you glance over to try and inspect what the source of this light is. It's a jellyfish bloom. You see hundreds and hundreds of these tiny jellyfish below the surface that are giving this faint bioluminescent blues and pinks and variety of colors in that pastel spectrum. They pass under the waves as you move by and you look out beyond that and you can see a few more. For the next hour or so, you look over the water and pass by these beautiful little beacons of color in the middle of this dark black ocean.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Want both of us to do it?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Sure. Ten.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: The remainder of the evening goes thankfully uneventful. The blooms fade as you pass through the evening mating grounds of these jellyfish. The next day comes, the morning comes, and your first true on-the-ocean breakfast kicks in. Thankfully, because of supplies that were purchased, there are a number of fresh meats available. A proper breakfast can be made. You can see through the crew that you've hired, they're quite surprised by the quality of food they're given on this journey. There's a bit of like a, "Damn, now I'm glad I agreed to this journey." They take some food and a couple of them are like--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I would like for her to be happy. I would like for him to love her. I don't know. I would like for her to not have to work anymore.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That's very noble of you. Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm pretty noble.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Well, how about on some of these islands I've heard that there is treasure.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh really?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Hard to find. I'm not making any promises, but if we play our cards right and we take care of each other, we might return a bit wealthier than we left.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: This is a pretty good plan. Then we can use that money to bribe The Gentleman to go back and woo my mama again.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Or give it to your mom and have her go find The Gentleman, but she's just amazing.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That could work, too.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Don't be sad. Your mom is very proud of you, that much was clear.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Thanks, Fjord.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Don't mention it.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Your guys' day shift goes by, keeping watch. Nothing really catches your attention; it's just open shores and open waters. Since you're off the trade route path, there don't appear to be any other ships passing back and forth. It feels comforting to be so alone in some ways, but for some of you, it's strangely isolating. There may be a few moments throughout the next few days where you have to go below deck and not conjecture, you especially, Caduceus. This is--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: The tiniest little owl that ever existed. This is a loaner.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You can have him for roughly a week.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: He doesn't look as angry as Professor Thaddeus.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: No, this is the way owls are supposed to be. I place him. He's going to listen to you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Is he?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I poke him and see if he bites me.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: He's dead.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Every time!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Everything that I touch!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: One ounce! One inch punch!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It is technically a monk weapon, the index finger.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: My hands are registered weapons!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: A couple rules. He will listen to you. Will you listen, Frumpkin? Frumpkin nods. Okay. If you need to get him out of danger in a hurry, you say "split." That's what it will take. You'll need me to bring him back, but if he's in danger and you want to keep him for your week loaner, you say split. Okay? He's yours. Thank you. Yeah?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Thanks, Caleb. Thank you.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Your guys' day shift goes by, keeping watch. Nothing really catches your attention; it's just open shores and open waters. Since you're off the trade route path, there don't appear to be any other ships passing back and forth. It feels comforting to be so alone in some ways, but for some of you, it's strangely isolating. preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA

That's what it will take. You'll need me to bring him back, but if he's in danger and you want to keep him for your week loaner, you say split. Okay? He's yours. Thank you. Yeah?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Thanks, Caleb. Thank you.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Day two and day three start getting a little hard on you to-- we've been traveling for 48 hours and literally everything looks exactly the same.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Thanks, Caleb. Thank you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Your guys' day shift goes by, keeping watch. Nothing really catches your attention; it's just open shores and open waters. Since you're off the trade route path, there don't appear to be any other ships passing back and forth. It feels comforting to be so alone in some ways, but for some of you, it's strangely isolating. There may be a few moments throughout the next few days where you have to go below deck and not conjecture, you especially, Caduceus. This is--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm good in my head.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. The beetles are now swarming this harpy who's taken bludgeoning. It is now bleeding profusely, and you can only see part of her torso and she's like (screeching). The song is dropped, and now is trying to fly away as she's picking up her wings, as these beetles are now tearing into her flesh. That ends your turn, Caduceus?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This also affects the other deckhands.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, so I'm just basically disrupting that song as long as it's within a certain range for about a minute. I'm also going to use my bonus action to wake up the bugs.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The mass of winged beetles begin to clatter out in a cloud.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: The one that's singing, I'm going to roll it towards the lollipop.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. They rush in there.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Snack time.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go ahead and make an attack. It's a d20.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, that'll definitely hit. That is 2d--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I got to fix this at some point.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I'll make a print out. Remind me to make a print out for you since this is having a hard time.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I know. We just haven't had time to fix anything.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I know.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Why not?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, it is 4d4.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's right. That's ooh! 15 points of damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 15 points of damage?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Beetle damage!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I don't even know what just happened.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Caduceus is back!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. There's the one on the back that's near death, it's going to attempt to fly away as well. It's going to move and dash. That's 80 feet out, and it's trying to catch up with the other two. Now there's three of them fleeing. That one, that one, and that one. All right. The two that are attacking-- there's two that are attacking the mast. One picked him one, one that's singing. I know, I'm trying to remember where it is. Okay, yeah. There we go. There's the one that tried to grab the one deckhand, it's going to swoop down and try and grab him again because he hasn't made his way fully in. Does manage to grab him. Swoops down, only gets partial, only 15 feet up with him. That's its turn. Let's see, the other two are going to go ahead-- Two are fleeing. That's fleeing. Oh, there's only one that's free. That one is going to attempt to attack one of the other sails because there's multiple sails up at that point. A smaller one. You know what? No, it's going to come after you since you're the one that's holding the sail. It's going to swoop down and attack you with claws.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, that's it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Back to the top of the round, harpies. Those two harpies full dash, full run, go spinning back in the direction they came. As far away from you as they can get.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Auf Wiedersehen!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Those two, for the time being, are out of the way. Let's see if they can make their save. Nope!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: They have to be out of line of sight. If they can see there's me on the boat--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's true, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That's what the spell says.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, facing away doesn't matter. Yeah, no, they're still running.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: See ya!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: That was the first time that it's been wounded. It gets hit by the large, spiritual lollipop as it's trying to carry off the deckhand, still holding on.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Let me roll for two attacks. Okay, that is 14 for one and a natural 19 for the other.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, roll damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Ten damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Ten damage total?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yep.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: With the next hit, you go ahead and just punch past the face and then with the other hand you wrap the rope around her throat then release. You watch the tension of the sail as it unfurls and snaps the neck of the harpy and drags her up and is now dangling from the rope as the sail is now unfurled again, still torn.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Did you do that on purpose?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Wind physics.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It was better results than I expected.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Always say yes!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That finishes up Beau's turn. Jester, you're up.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, I'm going to use my spiritual weapon to send it to the harpy that is trying to get that guy off the ground.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, go for it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Nine plus seven, it hits.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes, roll damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Eight points of damage to him.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: It takes a short time but you manage to, in the next ten minutes or so, feel comfortable that you've mended most of what the harpies had done.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I don't understand anything that just--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: How do we prevent further heart episodes from--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: More friendship! Just more friendship.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: More friendship?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: No, we just need to not be attacked by anything anymore, we need to just stop pursuing our pursuits, and pick an island and stay there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Are you saying you want to retire from adventuring life, Caleb?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Beau, go give Caleb a hug.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I feel pretty good, I feel like--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You're so-- why are you so stiff?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Like a Voldemort hug.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: This is feeling like it's going too far, Nott.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (hisses) It's working!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We've only done this once before, Caleb. It's still weird, I just want to point that out. Okay, let go of me. Get off, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Is it hot? Feels hot.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (whispers) 12.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No sign of any harpies.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: How's that sail coming, Jester?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm working on it!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Good to keep that in mind. As you bring your things in for the evening, that comes to a close; your second full day of travel, now the following morning, comes to bear. Who's keeping watch for this day?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I bought a couple barrels.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys bought a number of barrels. You filled a lot of them--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Whatever is left over if you could put in there, and I'm going to start something and hopefully something--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Like a stock?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: He wants his dead people tea.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I don't know what I'm going to get, I've never tried harpy before. It could be mushrooms, could be anything.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Start something.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Some bone broth, maybe?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to give it a little zing and see what I get.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Seeing Nott butcher the harpy, I go  Ooh! I look in my pocket and I pull out owl Frumpkin. Is owl Frumpkin okay?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Owl Frumpkin is fine.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Hey! Sorry about that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (owl hoot)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Back in my pocket.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Start moving his feet and his eyes stay in the same place.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I make his head dance a little bit.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I rolled for him last week and he appropriately only has one hit point.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You'll find out. It'll be a little while. You watch as the start of various fungus and fuzzy mold begins to appear at edges of its corpse. You've started it; a couple days, maybe you'll have something that will give you an idea what is growing.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Sure, I'll take that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a perception check for me please.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Ooh, that's terrible. 13.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 13, okay. For the day, you don't see anything. You do-- no, you don't see anything. Okay. Ocean! All wide ocean.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Are you listening underneath the boat? Using your sonar?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, what are you doing with your barrel?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I just was going to put anything that was dead now, and I was just going to see if I could maybe start either-- I don't know what they're going to make, but I'm curious if it's going to be anything I can either eat or use as a spice.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so you just begin to Decompose.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm using the Decompose and ferment and maybe hopefully getting some mushrooms or something, I don't know what harpies make. We'll find out.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: 20 minutes as they've try to makeshift plug the hole. It's a slow leak still, but they've managed to hold it off.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Does it look like there's a little island nearby?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yes, we've done the final turn, so we could try and push towards the island, but we're going to have to beach it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys are now turning towards the island and it's an open bay now. You passed the reef, and you're heading towards the island of Urukayxl.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Is there anywhere that looks like a dock, or anywhere that looks like it's appropriate to--?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a perception check.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I am. I think that's right, 26.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 26. No dock, but you do see another ship.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Ah!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What's your spell do?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What was your spell doing?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm making the tiny hut, but I don't know how much time has passed while I was peeing.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: The other ship has maneuvered up to the point where it is now, its full starboard side is facing you, full gun ports open. You're in a bad position.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, it's quite a distance from the island, you notice it as you go to move. It's quite a ways.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Okay, yeah. We'll lower the flags, slow the ship.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. You slow the ship-- do you come to a stop?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Mm-hmm.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. The ship, you bring it slowly down. Do you drop anchor?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Caleb? I want to talk about mutiny.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you're watching off to the side, you can see all the gun ports are open now. But you see two smaller boats that are now coming towards you from the other ship. You can see two separate small crews that are rowing in your direction.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Cool. Let's lower the rope ladder over the side and welcome them aboard.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You could technically stand and offer, I might add. Since you can actually stand on water.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I can what?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You can stand on water right now..

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, I don't know if he did that, so let's not.
